title: haplopappus velutinus subsp. illinitus
intro: Haplopappus velutinus subsp. illinitus, also known as the silky woolly marigold, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Haplopappus velutinus subsp. illinitus include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support immune function.
